series_metadata.series_title: Reporting Notice of Disease or Death of a Horse
series_metadata.series_description: This form gives notice to the Commission of a contagious or infectious disease for a horse at the permit holder premises. The form gives notice for the death and disposal of a horse which occurs at the permit holder''s premises

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The current year plus three prior years ; Electronic: The current year plus three prior years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
